targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_C')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_E')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'generated')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_C')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_E')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND Dist LIKE 'w_C%'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND Dist LIKE 'w_E%'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT count(DISTINCT Dist) AS hours
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE Dist LIKE 'w_%'
  AND toStartOfHour(timestamp) BETWEEN toStartOfHour(now() - INTERVAL 4 HOUR) AND toStartOfHour(now());

SELECT count(DISTINCT Dist) AS today
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE Dist LIKE 'w_%'
  AND toDate(timestamp) = toDate(now());

SELECT count(DISTINCT Dist) AS last_24h
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE Dist LIKE 'w_%'
  AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR;

SELECT count(DISTINCT Dist) AS last_72h
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE Dist LIKE 'w_%'
  AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 72 HOUR;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sumIf(Impressions, Dist LIKE 'w_%') / nullIf(sumIf(Requests, Dist LIKE 'w_%'), 0) AS win_rate_last_1hr
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sumIf(Requests, Dist LIKE 'w_%') AS Requests
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT sum(wattage_Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.hourly_last_72h_sums
WHERE hour_bucket >= toStartOfDay(now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY)
  AND hour_bucket < toStartOfDay(now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) + (now() - toStartOfDay(now()));

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sumIf(Impressions, Dist LIKE 'w_%') AS Impressions
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT sum(wattage_Impressions) AS impressions
FROM default.hourly_last_72h_sums
WHERE hour_bucket >= toStartOfDay(now())
  AND hour_bucket <  (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR);

SELECT sum(wattage_Impressions) AS impressions
FROM default.hourly_last_72h_sums
WHERE hour_bucket >= toStartOfDay(now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY)
  AND hour_bucket <  ((toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY);

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp + INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions_yesterday
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp + INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
  AND (timestamp + INTERVAL 24 HOUR) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp + INTERVAL 72 HOUR) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions_72h
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp + INTERVAL 72 HOUR)
  AND (timestamp + INTERVAL 72 HOUR) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp + INTERVAL 168 HOUR) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions_1w
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp + INTERVAL 168 HOUR)
  AND (timestamp + INTERVAL 168 HOUR) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_now
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_3mo_ago
FROM default.v_winrate_same_weekday_3mo_ago
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_shifted)
  AND toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

panels.title: 90 Day Side by Side Hourly Win Rate Month Compare

  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions_3mo_ago

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 0 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp + INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests_yesterday
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp + INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
  AND (timestamp + INTERVAL 24 HOUR) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp + INTERVAL 72 HOUR) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests_72h
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp + INTERVAL 72 HOUR)
  AND (timestamp + INTERVAL 72 HOUR) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp + INTERVAL 168 HOUR) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests_1w
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp + INTERVAL 168 HOUR)
  AND (timestamp + INTERVAL 168 HOUR) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time

  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests_last_month
FROM default.v_requests_same_weekday_1mo_ago
WHERE ts_shifted >= (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ts_shifted <  (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests_2mo_ago
FROM default.v_requests_same_weekday_2mo_ago
WHERE ts_shifted >= (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ts_shifted <  (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests_3mo_ago
FROM default.v_requests_same_weekday_3mo_ago
WHERE ts_shifted >= (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ts_shifted <  (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_C')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_E')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
  AND Dist LIKE '%_C_%'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
  AND Dist LIKE '%_E_%'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

WITH
  cutoff AS (
    SELECT (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) AS cut
  ),
  per_hour AS (
    SELECT
      toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
      sum(Impressions) AS imps,
      sum(Requests)    AS reqs
    FROM default.`25_ss_dist_reporting`
    WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT cut FROM cutoff) - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
      AND timestamp <  (SELECT cut FROM cutoff)
    GROUP BY time
  ),
  per_hour_win_volume AS (
    SELECT
      time,
      imps,
      reqs,
      imps / nullIf(reqs, 0) AS winrate,
      imps * (imps / nullIf(reqs, 0)) AS weighted_win
    FROM per_hour
  )
SELECT
  time,
  weighted_win / sum(weighted_win) OVER () * 100 AS winrate_share_pct
FROM per_hour_win_volume
ORDER BY time;
